name: Ton
description: The pig director of the accounting department, who constantly gives Retsuko a hard time through blatant sexism or overwork. He spends most of his time practicing golf instead of working, though it is shown that he is an incredibly good accountant despite being unable to use modern technology.

name: Touko Kirigaya
description: __Height:__ 164 cm (5'5") A student at Tsukinomori Girls' Academy and the the lead guitarist of the band Morfonica. She handles the band's costumes, and similarly to Lisa she follows gyaru fashion. A popular girl who gathers people around her both at school and on social media. Cheerful and open-hearted, but those around her are often caught up by her tendency to play things by ear. (Source: BanG Dream! Wikia)

name: Tsugumi Komachi

She is also initially quite distrustful of the rest of the group. ~!It's revealed that Tsugumi is a carrier of the Cure Virus, a rare genetic virus that enhances the body, stops its aging after five years, and has great curing power, being able to heal severe injuries in minutes and rendering her immune to nearly all diseases. name: Tsuu Terakado
description: An idol pop singer whose song lyrics are often very dirty or controversial. She started her career singing on the sides of streets. This was when Shinpachi met her and has followed her ever since, being captain of her fan club. Her talent was recognized by Bansai Kawakami (under his producer alias "Tsunpo"), and she has since gained popularity. Her mother manages her, and her father is currently serving time in prison. name: Violet
description: __Farm Identifier:__ DIV332-198 (Grand Valley) __D.O.B:__ Unknown __Hair Color:__ Purple __Eye Color:__ Purple Violet is a former orphan from the Grand Valley orphanage and a member of the Goldy Pond Resistance. Violet is the first person to encounter Emma at Goldy Pond.

name: Yagen Toushirou
description: A tantou made by Awataguchi Yoshimitsu. One of the Toushirou brothers. The origin of it's name comes from the stone medicine mortar that it cut, earning the reputation as a sword with "an extraordinary cutting ability but will not kill its master." Because he's raised for the battlefield, he has some medical science knowledge.

name: Yuki Kurokawa
description: __Height:__ 161 cm Kurokawa Yuki is on the tennis team and the one who caught Utsumi watching them secretly. After being confronted by Utsumi, Yuki reversed the accusations right back at him, demanding a pure reason for his sneaky actions. Utsumi gives in to Yuki that he has a crush on the tennis club captain Shou. Knowing the situation, Yuki wanted to help... by tricking him into joining the tennis team.

name: Zegion
description: One of the ninth group of subordinates to be named by Rimuru Tempest. He was originally an injured monster that looked like a Japanese rhinoceros beetle which he thought was cool so he took him in and sheltered him inside the Labyrinth. (Source: The Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime wiki)

name: 1-Gou
description: A penguin with thick eyebrows and a band-aid on his right cheek. He is always seen accompanying Kanba. He is a pervert who enjoys wearing women's underwear on his head and looking up skirts. He also seems to be interested in staying in shape, as seen when he was doing chin-ups on the train.

name: Akira Toudou
description: Akira Toudo is the daughter of the owner of an airline company. Ranked 6th in 10th grade. She is very fond of Hikari, and often won't do anything unless Hikari wants to do it also. She is very enthusiastic about her afternoon tea. ~!She was good friends with Yahiro and Kei as a child, but due to Yahiro's protective and somewhat selfish behavior (and a misunderstanding Yahiro never corrected), she avoids him as best she can. We later find out that the reason she is so fond of Hikari, is because a

name: Akutabe
description: Akutabe is a detective that specializes in using demons. He is very knowledgeable in the occult, and uses this knowledge to overpower the demons, even enabling him to block a powered up "divulgence" spell from Beelzebub. He is Sakuma's employer as well as a mentor. He will summon demons to do his bidding and will often mistreat them if they annoy him or mess up their assignments. He has shown to be cruel and rather sadistic causing even demons to be afraid of him.

name: Alma Karma
description: Alma Karma, also known as the "first womb", is the person responsible for the birth of the Third Exorcists. Present day Alma is shown to be quite disfigured, presumably from his life or death fight with Yuu Kanda before the events of D.Gray-Man. He appears to be a young man with huge scars down the left side of his face and body. He has long hair, reaching his legs, and an inverted triangle over his stomach area. ~!As a boy, Alma was the first of the Second Generation Exorcists to awaken with Yu

name: Alpha
description: Alpha (アルファ) is one of the most important characters in the Rebuild World web novel, light novel and manga. She is the first character to be introduced after series Protagonist Akira. She is a holographic AI, and is shown to have lime green hair, with blue eyes and a white/black dress. She can change her appearance at will, since she does not have a real body and is a hologram.

name: Angela Leon
description: The first real witch introduced in the series. She is nothing more than a kid witch that is not very good at magic, which is the reason Mifune is protecting her. She cares for Mifune and calls anyone that fights with him a bully (even if he started the fight). Her animal theme seems to be chameleons due to her hat's appearance, her last name, and the entrance of her castle. She is later shown attending the witch's meeting alongside Mifune, which greatly angers Eruka. The only magic she has shown
